metadata.title: FG Web Designs | Frontend Dev & QA Engineer
metadata.description: Professional web development and quality assurance services. Custom websites, e-commerce platforms, and responsive designs with meticulous testing.

hero.title: Felipe Gutierrez
hero.description: Transforming ideas into powerful digital experiences. From concept to deployment, I deliver pixel-perfect designs, robust code, and comprehensive quality assurance.

list.description: Improve your website's visibility and ranking in search engines.

list.title: Corporate Email

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Our development process is designed to ensure the best quality and customer satisfaction

steps.title: Meeting & Budget
steps.description: We start with a meeting to understand your needs and goals. We discuss the type of website you need, required functionalities, and establish a clear budget.
details: Create shared folder in Google Drive

steps.title: Development & Testing
steps.description: Once the budget is approved, we begin development. We implement the agreed functionalities and perform exhaustive tests to guarantee quality.

steps.title: Deployment & Delivery
steps.description: We deploy to production, configure the domain, server and SSL certificate. We deliver a fully functional and optimized website.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who I am
about.description: Frontend Developer and QA Engineer with a passion for creating exceptional digital experiences. I combine design sensibility with technical expertise to deliver products that are both beautiful and bulletproof.

jobs.description: Specialized in the management of design and development of custom websites, including E-Commerce, landing pages and corporate websites. Implementation of complete web solutions using modern technologies such as React, Next.js, WordPress and design tools like Figma.

Currently working as a Software Quality Assurance Engineer at Ucontact by net2phone, responsible for creating and executing test cases, reporting bugs and areas for improvement. Additionally, I am responsible for test automation and the integration of QA tools into the development workflow.
Worked as a contractor for Practia company, responsible for frontend feature development with technologies such as React Js, Next Js, Tailwind CSS, among others.

faqs.question: Do I need a custom domain?
faqs.answer: A custom domain (yourname.com) provides professionalism and credibility. I can help you register and configure your domain.

faqs.question: What hosting do you recommend?
faqs.answer: I work primarily with Vercel for Next.js projects and reliable shared hosting providers for WordPress. All recommendations include SSL and CDN.

faqs.question: Is SSL included?
faqs.answer: Yes, all projects include free SSL certificates via Let's Encrypt or the hosting provider's built-in solution.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: About future projects
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Let's discuss how we can work together to bring your ideas to life.
contact.formDescription: Fill out the form with as much detail as possible. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Describe your idea, goals, and any relevant details...
contact.formSuccessDescription: Thanks for reaching out. I'll contact you very soon to talk about your project.
